Kadir Has University

The Department of Management Information Systems

The Department of Management Information Systems (MIS) at Kadir Has University offers students an interdisciplinary education born from the combination of business management and information technologies. The programme aims to provide theoretical knowledge and practical skills in areas such as software development, database management, e-commerce and decision support systems. Students are supported by mentoring from the industry, meetings with industry leaders and project-based activities. Graduates have career opportunities in a wide range of fields, especially in systems analysis, software development and consultancy.
